name: Redwood Credit Union
description_short: Redwood Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services with physical branches including San Francisco.
description_long:
Redwood Credit Union (RCU) is a federally-regulated credit union serving members across multiple locations, with a documented San Francisco branch at 1390 Market Street. As a credit union, RCU operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than as a for-profit institution. The organization provides comprehensive banking services including account opening, digital banking platforms, loan services, and member support through both in-person and remote channels. The San Francisco branch specifically serves the local community with dedicated staff and customized financial solutions.

RCU offers a full suite of banking products and services including checking and savings accounts, loan products (with documented PPP loan servicing), digital banking via web and mobile app, 24/7 ATM access, notary services, and investment/insurance/auto services through appointment. Members can access their accounts through digital banking platforms, a 24-hour telephone teller line (1-800-RCU-4030), and a Member Service Center (1-800-479-7928). The organization provides bilingual support, with Spanish-language appointment options documented at their San Francisco branch. RCU participates in the Co-op Network ATM system, providing access to 30,000+ free ATMs nationwide.

RCU distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, which emphasizes member service and community focus over profit maximization. The San Francisco branch is led by a dedicated Branch Experience Manager who emphasizes commitment to serving members and the local community. The organization demonstrates strong fraud prevention messaging and privacy commitment, explicitly stating they do not sell member data to third parties. Their bilingual services and flexible appointment scheduling reflect responsiveness to diverse community needs.

RCU functions as a traditional full-service credit union suitable for members seeking basic to intermediate banking needs. However, the website content provided is limited to branch-specific information and does not comprehensively document all products, rates, fees, or competitive features. Consumers should verify current offerings, APR rates on loans, and account terms directly, as specific product details are not available from the provided sources.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Member-owned credit union structure with non-profit governance model
Access to 30,000+ free Co-op Network ATMs plus 24/7 walk-up ATM at San Francisco branch
Bilingual services including Spanish-language appointment scheduling and support
Explicit privacy commitment: does not sell member data to third parties
Multiple access channels: digital banking app, 24-hour telephone teller (1-800-RCU-4030), and Member Service Center
In-person notary services available at branch locations
Documented fraud prevention protocols and member security education
cons: Limited branch hours at San Francisco location (M-F 9am-5pm only, closed weekends/holidays)
Website content does not disclose specific APR rates, fees, or competitive product terms
PPP loan program appears to be legacy service; modern product offerings not fully documented
No information provided about minimum account balances or membership requirements
Limited detail on business banking or advanced financial planning services available
best_for: San Francisco Bay Area residents seeking full-service banking with local branch support
Spanish-speaking consumers who value bilingual banking services and support
Credit union members prioritizing privacy and member-owned institutional structure
Customers wanting 24/7 ATM access through extended Co-op Network partnership
diagnosis: Redwood Credit Union is best for San Francisco-area residents and broader members seeking traditional full-service banking through a member-owned, privacy-conscious credit union with bilingual support. The primary caveat is that detailed product information, rates, and fees are not available from the provided website content, requiring direct contact for specific account terms and competitive comparison.
services: Digital banking platform (web and mobile app)
Walk-up ATM services with cash withdrawal and deposit
Bilingual appointment scheduling and member support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
